title: Front Office Manager - Scootsy - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Scootsy - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Scootsy are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Scootsy:
Scootsy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scootsy!
